wins: Accelerating actions to improve profitability and capital efficiency by more than $10 billion in 2025
Cost reduction plan with head count reduction of greater than 15% by the end of 2025
Expected reduction in OpEx to approximately $20 billion in 2024
Introduction of Panther Lake, first client CPU on Intel 18A
Strong ecosystem for AIPC with over 15 million Windows AIPC shipped
risks: Q3 revenue growth will be slower than expected due to inventory digestion and cyclical businesses
Lower-than-anticipated revenue in the back half of the year impacting gross margins
Competitive pricing and unfavorable product mix impacting margins
Challenges in the client business due to export controls and China market conditions
Uncertainty in the recovery of the traditional CPU market
